summary: Mislabeled tracks hurt the listening experience and reviewers found no standout moments in the performance.
review: The recording suffers from a track‑labeling error that shifts titles after "Scarlet Begonias," making navigation confusing. Aside from this technical hiccup, listeners reported an unremarkable show with no particular highlights worth noting.

ai_rating.rationale: Only two brief reviews; one praises the recording despite a labeling issue (5★) while the other calls the show uneventful (3★). The mixed feedback leads to an overall moderate rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Tracks after "Scarlet Begonias" are mislabeled, causing title offsets; no comments on audio clarity or mix.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No highlights mentioned; the performance is considered average with no notable peaks.
